items.scenario: You are a regular user of your neighborhood community center. Last month the center set up a new composting station in the lobby. You have used it several times, but the bins are often full by midday.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Donnelly. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe how you have been using the new composting station
Explain the problem you noticed with the full bins
Ask whether the center can collect from the bins more often
items.subject: Composting station capacity

items.scenario: You are a new part-time employee at a bookstore, starting your first shift next week. During orientation you received a staff handbook. The section on scheduling was missing several pages, so you are unsure how shifts are assigned.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Langford. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain which part of the staff handbook was incomplete
Describe what you need to understand before your first shift
Ask how shifts are assigned to new employees
items.subject: Missing scheduling pages

items.scenario: You are a third-year biology student hoping to work as a teaching assistant next semester. A note on the department board says applications are now open. However, it did not list the eligibility requirements or the deadline.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Aldridge. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe your background and interest in the assistant position
Explain what information the posting left out
Ask how to submit an application
items.subject: Teaching assistant eligibility

items.scenario: You are a member of a local sailing club that offers weekend beginner courses. You enrolled in the course starting this Saturday. The confirmation email lists a meeting spot that differs from the one on the club's website.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Kessler. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain which course you enrolled in
Describe the conflicting location information you received
Ask which meeting location is correct
items.subject: Sailing course meeting location
